name: Cell Maps for Artificial Intelligence
description: The CM4AI data generation project seeks to map the spatiotemporal architecture of human cells and use these maps toward the grand challenge of interpretable genotype-phenotype learning.  It computes hierarchical cell maps using AI/ML methods, on protein interaction and localization data, with perturb seq data, for disease relevant cell lines, and provides data in AI-ready form.

name: A Perturbation Cell Atlas of Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cells
description: An expressed genome-scale CRISPRi Perturbation Cell Atlas in KOLF2.1J human induced pluripotent stem cells (hiPSCs) mapping transcriptional and fitness phenotypes associated with 11,739 targeted genes

name: Protein-protein Interaction Networks from AP-MS and SEC-MS on Disease-relevant Cell Lines
description: A protein-protein interaction (PPI) network of 100 chromatin regulators under different conditions (cancer: no treatment, paclitaxel or vorinostat; iPSC: undifferentiated,neurons and cardiomyocytes), using  AP-MS on endogenously tagged cell lines and size-exclusion chromatography coupled to mass spectrometry (SEC-MS) for proteome-wide complex/interaction mapping.

name: Spatial Proteomics on Disease Relevant Cell Lines
description: Project maps the spatial subcellular organization of key chromatin modifiers, their interactors and key signaling molecules involved in disease-relevant cell lines under molecular perturbation, using immunofluorescence confocal microscopy.

name: Hierarchical Cell Mapping
description: The Multi-Scale Integrated Cell (MuSIC) pipeline produces integrated hierarchical cell maps from the multiple, multi-modal input data streams using AI/ML algorithms, and makes them avaiable as AI-ready data.
